feed.title: My DevOps Blog
feed.subtitle: Built as part of a Level 5 DevOps learning guide.

entry.title: Lets See the pipeline Run!
entry.content: Making the pipeline run and chun through those useful actions which help us identify errors and vulnerabilities in double quick time.
entry.summary: Making the pipeline run and chun through those useful actions which help us identify errors and vulnerabilities in double quick time.

entry.title: Lets try Linting tests
entry.content:
Trying out a Linting automate to see if it can catch any errors!

Lets get to Bobbling
entry.summary: Trying out a Linting automate to see if it can catch any errors!

entry.title: Hello, World
entry.content:
This is my first post. The pipeline that published it is the point.

Jekyll Build
entry.summary: This is my first post. The pipeline that published it is the point.
